title: McDonalds Evangelion Tie in
wikitext:
[]: McDonald's Evangelion Tie-in             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Dec 25, 2024 4:57 pm We have a 30th anniversary McDonalds tie-in - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XlcGWwUw4kY

[]: Re: McDonald's Evangelion Tie-in             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Thu Dec 26, 2024 12:45 pm Something interesting is that they are using clips and sounds from the original show for ads, not NTE stuff. This is quite intriguing considering the promotion is taking place in Japan, where NTE is very popular. Now that I think about it, even the Evangelions' designs are from the original anime. And there's no sign of Mari and Kaworu in the promotional material either... They did released a new ad whose art style is closer to HA's, but isn't that Soryu ? tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: McDonald's Evangelion Tie-in             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Dec 27, 2024 3:13 am A bunch more - all re-voicing clips from the original series https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MSSaFpKPP_s https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EMxci2qPZn8 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4KabzEcvGEU

[]: Re: McDonald's Evangelion Tie-in             Quote Post by ::KL7:: » Fri Dec 27, 2024 7:38 am That image of Rei holding a McDonald’s bag will be someone’s profile picture before long. If it hasn’t already been done.

[]: Re: McDonald's Evangelion Tie-in B/             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Fri Dec 27, 2024 5:09 pm What makes them an "Evangelion Burger" though? Are they dyed or something?

[]: Re: McDonald's Evangelion Tie-in             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Fri Dec 27, 2024 5:12 pm Yeah, I noticed too that the designs of the Evas and pretty much everything align with NGE, but with NTE quality. Some scenes were redone from the TV series, some are recycled from Rebuilds. It's quite the mix-up going on there. But also: DAMN! This funny From the McDonald's menu on Maya's desk, to the SEELE meeting with the French fries monoliths, to the burger-shaped AT field, this is probably the funniest collab I've seen Evangelion get involved into. And we can all agree that Evangelion has done just about every possible collab! Edit: I just noticed that Shinji says "I mustn't eat it! I mustn't eat it!", Asuka yells "Anta burger!?" and Misato goes "oshii [tasty] Field, max power"

[]: Re: McDonald's Evangelion Tie-in             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Sun Dec 29, 2024 6:28 pm BernardoCairo wrote: Something interesting is that they are using clips and sounds from the original show for ads, not NTE stuff.

[]: Re: McDonald's Evangelion Tie-in B/             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Mon Dec 30, 2024 2:56 am Holy crap, the kids meal toys are epic: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3i_642yxX4A SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: McDonald's Evangelion Tie-in             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Mon Dec 30, 2024 11:59 am For those that don't know, these are riffs on transforming toys McD's used to have in the 80s and 90s. They turned into animal creatures IIRC. I have vivid memories of playing with them as a kid.

[]: Re: McDonald's Evangelion Tie-in             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Wed Jan 01, 2025 5:51 pm Axx°N N. wrote: I assume it's because while the 30th anniversary is for the franchise in toto, it's really more specifically the anniversary of the original's airdate.

[]: Re: McDonald's Evangelion Tie-in             Quote Post by Horizon » Sun Feb 09, 2025 8:26 pm This wasn't in my 2024/2025 bingo chart

[]: Re: McDonald's Evangelion Tie-in             Quote Post by Evil Eye » Sat Feb 22, 2025 11:00 pm "Anta Burger!?" might be the peak of the franchise (or it would be if After The End didn't exist).
